title: Prepare and apply chemicals to control pest, weeds and diseases
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and apply chemicals to control pest, weeds and diseases demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine the need for chemical use and prepare an application plan

pcs.text: Identify the pest, weed or disease, and assess the need for control
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the pest, weed or disease, and assess the need for control?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the pest, weed or disease, and assess the need for control.

pcs.text: Assess the requirement for chemical use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the requirement for chemical use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the requirement for chemical use.

pcs.text: Assess health and safety hazard, risks and controls for different chemicals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess health and safety hazard, risks and controls for different chemicals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess health and safety hazard, risks and controls for different chemicals.

pcs.text: Confirm requirement for chemical application according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm requirement for chemical application according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm requirement for chemical application according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Assess off target risk of each application method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess off target risk of each application method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess off target risk of each application method.

pcs.text: Assess the environmental risk for application method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the environmental risk for application method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the environmental risk for application method.

pcs.text: Notify stakeholders of intended chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify stakeholders of intended chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify stakeholders of intended chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare application plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare application plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare application plan according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine the need for chemical use and prepare an application plan

elements.title: Prepare chemical mixes

pcs.text: Identify and select chemical required for target according to application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select chemical required for target according to application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select chemical required for target according to application plan.

pcs.text: Calculate the volume, rate or dose according to chemical label instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the volume, rate or dose according to chemical label instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the volume, rate or dose according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Identify and select application equipment and set-up requirements according to application plan and operator instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select application equipment and set-up requirements according to application plan and operator instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select application equipment and set-up requirements according to application plan and operator instructions.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for application method according to chemical label and health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for application method according to chemical label and health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for application method according to chemical label and health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)  according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)  according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)  according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select appropriate mixing equipment and suitable location to prepare and load chemicals according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate mixing equipment and suitable location to prepare and load chemicals according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate mixing equipment and suitable location to prepare and load chemicals according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare chemicals according to chemical label instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare chemicals according to chemical label instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare chemicals according to chemical label instructions.

pcs.text: Return unused chemical to store and clean preparation equipment and work site of residues and spillage according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return unused chemical to store and clean preparation equipment and work site of residues and spillage according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return unused chemical to store and clean preparation equipment and work site of residues and spillage according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare chemical mixes

elements.title: Calibrate application equipment

pcs.text: Select application equipment for chemical according to application plan, off target risks and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select application equipment for chemical according to application plan, off target risks and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select application equipment for chemical according to application plan, off target risks and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational checks of application equipment according to operator and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational checks of application equipment according to operator and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational checks of application equipment according to operator and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Calibrate equipment according to operating instructions and application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate equipment according to operating instructions and application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate equipment according to operating instructions and application plan.

pcs.text: Load equipment with chemical according to operating instructions and workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load equipment with chemical according to operating instructions and workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load equipment with chemical according to operating instructions and workplace safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Calibrate application equipment

elements.title: Apply chemicals

pcs.text: Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective chemical application according to application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective chemical application according to application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess weather conditions and forecasts to ensure effective chemical application according to application plan.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use PPE according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use PPE according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use PPE according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Apply chemical according to label directions and application plan relating to the control of the pest, weed or disease
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply chemical according to label directions and application plan relating to the control of the pest, weed or disease?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply chemical according to label directions and application plan relating to the control of the pest, weed or disease.

pcs.text: Monitor application equipment for correct performance and ensure effective chemicals application according to operating instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor application equipment for correct performance and ensure effective chemicals application according to operating instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor application equipment for correct performance and ensure effective chemicals application according to operating instructions.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and implement controls.

pcs.text: Clean up spills during application according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean up spills during application according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean up spills during application according to chemical label instructions and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Apply chemicals

elements.title: Clean up equipment and complete records

pcs.text: Clean and decontaminate application equipment according to operator instructions, safety data sheets (SDS) and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and decontaminate application equipment according to operator instructions, safety data sheets (SDS) and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and decontaminate application equipment according to operator instructions, safety data sheets (SDS) and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of chemicals and used containers according to chemical label instructions, SDS and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of chemicals and used containers according to chemical label instructions, SDS and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of chemicals and used containers according to chemical label instructions, SDS and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Clean and store PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report safety and environmental incidents according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report safety and environmental incidents according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report safety and environmental incidents according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Record details of chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details of chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of chemical application according to workplace procedures and legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Clean up equipment and complete records
